summary: Construction/contracting project called 'urbantheekedaar' with public form submissions (no login required) and admin panel with Internet Identity login.
architectural_notes: Form submissions are public (no authentication required); admin panel uses Internet Identity login

existing_features.title: Remove Internet Identity authentication requirement from all public-facing form submissions. The Contact form, Estimate Calculator, and Chatbot query submission form must allow anonymous users to submit without logging in. Authentication should only be required for the admin panel.
In the Hero section, style the tagline text 'urbantheekedaar we build structures that last generations' to be big, bold, and orange in color.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove login requirement for form submissions — anyone can submit without authentication
Style 'urbantheekedaar we build structures that last generations' text as big, bold, and orange
